s part of the generous grant from SanDisk for the renovation of the surrounding area of Cory Hall. Topics: Purpose of the Renovations Plans , Floor Plan References Purpose of the Renovations: The new lab will offer a comfortable and attractive envi

w lab will offer a comfortable and attractive environment with these features: * accessible to all students in CS/EECS courses and majors, 24x7 * electrical, wireless and wired Airbears connections for 20 laptop users * group collaboration space,

for 20 laptop users * group collaboration space, with a large LCD display * 5 desktop PCs (Intel NUCs) on the EECS network running Windows * printer, flatbed scanner, slide scanner References: network ports ISG goals and priorities (ISG manager's re
